name: Parseur Document Parser
shortDescription: Parseur is an AI-powered document parsing service that extracts structured data from emails, PDFs, and other documents. This FlowRunner extension integrates Parseur's powerful document processing capabilities.

actions.name: Upload Document
actions.description: Uploads a document to a mailbox for parsing

actions.name: List Documents
actions.description: Lists all documents in a mailbox

actions.name: Reprocess Document
actions.description: Reprocesses a document with updated template or settings

actions.name: Delete Document
actions.description: Deletes a document from a mailbox
